title: The Internet Is No Longer Human
summary: Web traffic is now dominated by bot requests rather than human visits. AI systems like Google AI Overviews are answering queries before users click through to websites, and AI agents are beginning to make autonomous purchases and browse on behalf of humans. The video argues this represents a fundamental shift in how the internet functions, raising questions about whether machines are now the primary users of web infrastructure.
writeup: The video argues that web traffic is now dominated by bot requests rather than human visits, marking a shift in who the internet primarily serves. It points to Google AI Overviews answering queries before users click through to websites, and to AI agents that browse and make autonomous purchases on behalf of humans. The takeaway: machines may now be the main users of web infrastructure, which raises questions about how the internet functions when scraping, AI-generated answers, and agent-driven activity displace direct human visits.
